<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/integrationProgram/manualJson"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Manually pushes integration data to external systems. Handles batch requests with authentication validation and error tracking.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>

array of Manual Integration requests that you want to add","required":true}}
